name: @ont/anchor-store
description: ONT shared durable confirmed-anchor store — node-targeted file store + slice-2a codec + the record/store types. SHARED infrastructure: the indexer writes (has/put), the resolver reads (getByTxid). No consensus/firewall logic; persistence only. Extracted from @ont/indexer (G2 slice 6a) so the read path has no app->app edge.
